title: The Quiet Was Only the Guns

mood.label: Uneasy calm 🌥️
mood.summary: The direct US-Iran fighting paused and markets stayed calm, but deadly wildfires in Spain, a super typhoon over Taiwan, a worsening Ebola outbreak and a still-shut Strait of Hormuz kept the day at the low end of an uneasy calm.

style.genre: late-night piano-trio nocturne / slow noir-soul — a sampled grand piano comping loose B aeolian voicings over a brushed EmuSP12 kit and a plucked pizzicato upright bass walking the low end, a sampled clarinet tracing a smoky, circling topline in the gaps, a faint bowed-string pad and a soft sine sub holding the warmth, with sparse glockenspiel glints for the two quiet wins; aeolian's plain natural minor sitting a shade below level — a day of heavy weather and worsening outbreaks held, not dramatized, over a market that stayed calm and a war that went quiet for a night

sampleSources: Strudel default library (sampled piano, VCSL strings & pizzicato, gm_clarinet, glockenspiel, EmuSP12)
pattern: stack( s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~, ~ ~ ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~, hh ~ hh ~ hh ~ hh ~").bank("EmuSP12").gain(perlin.range(0.26,0.44).slow(8)).room(0.3).delay(0.22).delaytime(0.24), note("<[b3,d4,fs4,a4] [g3,b3,d4,fs4] [d3,fs3,a3,cs4] [a2,cs3,e3,g3]>").s("piano").attack(0.02).release(1.5).gain(0.42).lpf(sine.range(1300,2500).slow(16)).room(0.4).rsize(4), note("fs4 ~ a4 b4 ~ a4 g4 ~ fs4 ~ e4 fs4 ~ d4 ~ cs4").s("gm_clarinet").attack(0.05).release(0.4).gain(perlin.range(0.2,0.32).slow(7)).lpf(2600).room(0.4).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.1875).off(0.125, x=>x.gain(0.12).s("glockenspiel").lpf(3200)), note("b2 fs2 g2 d2 a2 e2 fs2 a2").s("pizzicato").gain(0.3).lpf(1000).room(0.25).off(0.5, x=>x.gain(0.1)), note("<[b2,fs3] [g2,d3] [d3,a3] [a2,e3]>").s("strings").attack(1.2).sustain(0.8).release(2.6).gain(0.13).lpf(sine.range(500,1300).slow(24)).room(0.55).rsize(5).hpf(130), note("b1 ~ ~ ~ e1 ~ fs1 ~").s("sine").gain(0.32).lpf(180).attack(0.03).release(0.7), note("~ ~ b5 ~ ~ ~ fs5 ~").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.14).room(0.5).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.5).pan(0.6).slow(2) )

lines: The guns went quiet over Tehran — two days of fire gone still,
mediators work the open lines, talking against the will.
Washington still calls it over, but the phones stay warm tonight,
while the tankers idle off the strait, near zero, out of sight.
It's an uneasy calm — forty-one and holding low,
the market climbs a quiet stair while the far hills glow.
The guns are paused, but the sky won't rest, the sea won't clear the lane —
one honest notch beneath the line, half relief and half the rain.
But the quiet was only the guns — Almería's ridgelines burned,
twelve caught in a dry riverbed on a road that never turned.
Bavi shuts the whole of Taiwan, Ebola's past six hundred gone,
El Obeid still keeps its siege, and Caracas keeps its dead.
It's an uneasy calm — forty-one and holding low,
grief on the heavy side, and a small, stubborn glow.
A three-euro vaccine keeps the fever off a child,
and six years of tents in Fiji fold — the low end, reconciled.
